twitter_thread: Tested 27 AI content tools in 2026, and 23 failed to meet basic standards. Here's what went wrong.
Top performers like Acrolinx and Content Blossom use fact-checking and tone analysis to refine content.
Beware of tools like BuzzwordPro that prioritize clicks over clarity with 50% more ads than actual content.
Investing $1,000 in tech-focused FTSE trusts like Polar Capital can yield 8% passive income in 2026.
May 2026's top gadgets, such as the Apple Watch, show how AI-driven design can inform consumer behavior.
When evaluating AI tools, look for integration with existing workflows like Trello and Asana.
What's your experience with AI content tools in 2026? Do they live up to the hype? #aiwriting #contentmarketing
